faqs.question: What is the admission process of HETIC Bangalore?
faqs.answer:
The admission process of HETIC Bangalore consists of multiple stages, including application, selection process and other steps. Find below all the step of the admission process of HETIC Bangalore:
Those who fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria needs to apply online on the official website of the institute.
The institute only offers two courses, i.e., BMS an MBA. The admission to BMS is merit-based, while for MBA aspirants need to pass entrance exams such as CAT/ MAT/ CMAT etc. For the selection in MBA course, students also need to qualify for the GD/PI rounds.
After completion of the selection rounds, the institute releases a merit list with the names of the shortlisted candidates all the UG and PG courses. Selected aspirants need to report for document verification and confirm the admission with fee payment after receiving the offer letter from the institute.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with teachers, owner of the college, who discriminates against Kashmiris.

review_content.Placements: During our whole course of my degree of 3 years, no company visits our college to provide jobs to any student, and no package was offered in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average. I am a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel facility. The medical facilities were not available in this college. Sports facility was not provided for the students to enjoy the games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were having rude behavior with students especially during exam time, I would also discuss with teachers that teachers were average, and exams were difficult, but sometimes easy overall it was average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of placements.

review_content.Placements: My senior says that about four students out of 120 students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit our college for placements. A top role offered in our college is a site engineer. Our college does not provide an internship for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The college is located in the outskirts of the main city. The buildings are not much old and are in good condition. The campus is lush green, and it looks good. Our college provides facilities like a basketball court, cricket ground, table tennis court, badminton court, etc. Every facility is available in our college. Our college provides excellent hostel facility with well-furnished rooms separately for both boys and girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am well satisfied with my college and the faculty they provide.

review_content.Placements: Placements offered in our course are best as about 75% of the students get placed every year from our course. I have seen that almost all our seniors got placed in highly reputed companies. The highest salary package offered is up to 10 LPA, while the lowest salary package offered is up to 6 LPA. Every student gets an internship Certificate in a reputed company, but None of the students did it and got trained except me.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college wi-fi facility is available. All labs are fully equipped with the instrument. The college infrastructure is very good there is a sports facility is available like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball we etc. The hostel is available but there rating is average. Mess facility is a good quality of food is good.

review_summary.college_name: Ram Devi Jindal Group of Professional Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with teachers, owner of the college, who discriminates against Kashmiris.

content.Placements: During our whole course of my degree of 3 years, no company visits our college to provide jobs to any student, and no package was offered in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average. I am a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel facility. The medical facilities were not available in this college. Sports facility was not provided for the students to enjoy the games.
content.Faculty: Teachers were having rude behavior with students especially during exam time, I would also discuss with teachers that teachers were average, and exams were difficult, but sometimes easy overall it was average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of placements.

content.Placements: My senior says that about four students out of 120 students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit our college for placements. A top role offered in our college is a site engineer. Our college does not provide an internship for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The college is located in the outskirts of the main city. The buildings are not much old and are in good condition. The campus is lush green, and it looks good. Our college provides facilities like a basketball court, cricket ground, table tennis court, badminton court, etc. Every facility is available in our college. Our college provides excellent hostel facility with well-furnished rooms separately for both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am well satisfied with my college and the faculty they provide.

content.Placements: Placements offered in our course are best as about 75% of the students get placed every year from our course. I have seen that almost all our seniors got placed in highly reputed companies. The highest salary package offered is up to 10 LPA, while the lowest salary package offered is up to 6 LPA. Every student gets an internship Certificate in a reputed company, but None of the students did it and got trained except me.
content.Infrastructure: In my college wi-fi facility is available. All labs are fully equipped with the instrument. The college infrastructure is very good there is a sports facility is available like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball we etc. The hostel is available but there rating is average. Mess facility is a good quality of food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements with scope for improvement.

content.Placements: 10 percent of students have been placed in various companies. The highest package offered is 4.5 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Emphasis is the top recruiting company. The most offered job role is full-stack developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostel facilities are decent. The mess food is hygienic, medical support is available, and sports facilities encourage student fitness and participation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied about placement because the students are not placed more than 10%.

content.Placements: The percentage of placement in my college is around 10%. About 100 students get placement, and the internships offered at our college have around 10 students getting placed outside the college. The roles offered for the internships are only in software engineering and nothing else.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, and the faculty is not good. They have an outdated syllabus and teaching skills. They don't know the subject properly, and the Wi-Fi is either not available or, if it is, the internet connectivity is poor and slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college experience, great faculty & nice campus learning environment.

content.Placements: In my college, 10 percent of students are selected on the campus, and the highest package is 5 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. We got mnc companies like emphasis and cognigent, and also basis, and we also got some startup companies and roles for s/w.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, a spacious library with digital resources, project rooms, and seminar halls that support practical learning and research activities. Mess food is decent and hygienic, with canteen options available.

reviews_list.review_title: It was a good college only in the year 2013. Later, it is the worst with no placements and teachers.

review_summary.college_name: College of Technology and Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College of Technology and Engineering.

content.Placements: This college does not have a good placement record in recent years. Students who want good placement go for off-campus placements. Barely any company comes to this college to hire interns. Most students do not depend on placements. They either go for M.Tech or prepare for government jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and library have decent infrastructure. There are a few labs which I have discovered have equipment that is not working, like the Fluid Mechanics lab, the Strength of Materials lab, and the Heat Transfer lab. The girls' hostel has a pathetic scenario. Washrooms are dirty and unhygienic. Several times the hostel mess food is unhygienic. Girls have faced power cut issues many times and they run out of water during a power cut.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of CTAE Udaipur.

content.Placements: Placement in Agriculture Engineering is 100% before Corona. After it, placement is around 90–95 percent. In other streams, Electrical Engineering has the best placement. In 2025, in the ECE department, 21 students got placed. CSE has a decent placement, while Mechanical Engineering has the worst placement.
content.Infrastructure: The first year has a common building where all students study together. The first-year block has a round-shaped, nice building. On the ground floor, there are four classrooms. On the first floor, there is a Chemistry lab and a Physics lab. In the hostel, An Khoshala Hostel is for first-year students. The hostel is as old as the college. Rooms are of decent size for living for one year. You may face problems with timing as it is from 7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. Wi-Fi is available but not working. Food is average, and Sunday lunch has a special diet, while Sunday dinner is off (dal–chawal).

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College condition is good.

content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 13 LPA. The lowest package is around 4 LPA, and the average package offered in our course is approximately 8 LPA. Top companies for my course are John Deere, Mahindra, CNH, and Escorts. All students got internships at John Deere and Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: There are 4 departments in my course. The infrastructure is below average. There is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus. The condition of labs is average. But classrooms are decent with good airy environment. Quality of hostel in terms of infrastructure is very poor. But the quality of food is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: There are total 60 students in the College of Technology and Engineering Udaipur of which only total 2 students are placed in a reputable company. The highest package is 5 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA - 4 LPA in the college.
content.Infrastructure: There are total four hostels at the College of Technology and Engineering Udaipur in which the first year hostel name is an Khosla, second year hostel name is MV, third year named NSCB, and the fourth year hostel name is PG hostel. There are total 8 Wi-Fis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you compare with the feels, then it is a nice college.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed, and the highest package in my course was 10 LPA, and the lowest was around 3 LPA. The average package offered is around 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Vedanta, and internships are easy. Some companies come and hire in bulk.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi with decent speed is available. Labs are okay, and classrooms are good. The library is also good. The hostel has electrical and mechanical issues. Mess food is good, but not comparable to the food at home. They have various sports grounds, but the football ground is not maintained.

admission_process.title: College of Technology and Engineering Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: College of Technology and Engineering admissionsare a blend of merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. Some of the exams accepted by the institute are JEE Main, REAP, etc. Students must secure a valid score in the relevant exam, and meet the eligibility. Interested students can completeCollege of Technology and Engineering admission processbelow:
Application and Registration

Students can apply for the accepted exam and participate in the counselling process for seat allotment. For direct admission against vacant seats, students may go to the college's site and submit the application with documents.
Selection Process

College of Technology and Engineering selectionis mainly entrance-based, but the college may also accept merit-based applications. Students have to meet both the basic eligibility and selection rounds to get a seat at the college.
Admission Confirmation
Selected students have to report with documents for verification and then pay theCollege of Technology and Engineering feesto secure their seats at the college.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi with decent speed is available. Labs are okay, and classrooms are good. The library is also good. The hostel has electrical and mechanical issues. reviews.review_heading: The college is okay, and the placement opportunities are also okay.
reviews.review_text: There are four departments within Agricultural Engineering, such as Soil and Water Engineering, Farm Machinery and Power Engineering, Renewable Energy Engineering, and Processing and Food Engineering. Wi-Fi facility is available inside the hostel, and filtered water is also available. Each year has a different hostel. The canteen and mess food are good, and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for knowledge, but not good placement.
reviews.review_text: There is no good Wi-Fi connectivity in college. Labs are in good condition, classrooms are average, and the library is good. You will get study material from there. The quality of food is above average, no good medical facilities, and the college is good at sports.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are pretty good at teaching and have a helpful nature, and the college is good.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms and library are good, but labs have old model computers, and they are not in good condition. Hostel facilities are also not good. The mess has no hygiene and no taste in food; many students have food issues. There are no game facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College of Technology and Engineering, Udaipur, and their details in this review: a good college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a library with many books related to our field, and competition exam books are also available. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. Food is good; the canteen has many things in its outlet. Medical facilities are also provided on campus. A sports pavilion is also present in the main college ground. A badminton court, cricket ground, and volleyball court are also situated there.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, especially in mechanical, electrical, and mining.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms of the College of Technology and Engineering are excellent. They are well-equipped with AC, and the conditions of the labs are also good. They are well-maintained, and there is a library also. The hostels are not in good condition, especially the first- and second-year ones.

reviews.review_heading: There is no good placement. The campus and the food are not good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi labs are in good condition. The library is fully available. However, the hostel is not in good condition. The rooms are not clean, and the food facilities are also not good, with no hygiene. We also face water problems many times, and the hostel looks old.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: In my department, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and seminar halls are available. The hostel is average. The food quality is normal to eat, not bad, and not good. In the college, 10 hostels are available, i.e., 2 girls and 8 boys. The hostel food is contract-based.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college according to the score in JEE and placements. College life is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is average and old, with 435 acres of campus. Wi-Fi is available in hostels or any other specific area. Labs are in proper condition, but our college prefers agricultural engineering because it is an agricultural university. First-year classes are held in the basic science department. The library is also available. All sports facilities are available. Inter-branch, college, and university games are organised.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best only for this department.
reviews.review_text: The condition of the hostel is okay, but the messy food is not good. It is a dummy. However, the hostel environment is okay. In one room 2 students are allowed. They provide one almirah, one table, one chair, and a bed. There is a volleyball playground in front of the hostel. The classrooms are well-digitalized and well-cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: College is ok. Moderate teacher at this college and also best for those who don't go NIT and IIT.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is okay. Hostel infrastructure is okay. In the first year, hostel infrastructure is not good. But at this time, work is in progress to build new infrastructure, and second, third, and fourth year infrastructure is better. In hostel, all basic facilities are available. Mess diet is okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This college is very helpful to me.

review_content.Placements: In my college, a minimum 40% and a maximum of 70% students are placed in different companies like TCS and Tech Mahindra and some finance companies at a package of 3 to 12 LPA. For my course, Capgemini, Annapurna Finance, etc., are hiring students from my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, various types of labs are available for Science students. In our college, a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel facility is good, but the food is not so good. In week 3 times, non-veg food is given by the hostel authority in our college, and once a year, a sports competition is arranged.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I love my college, but the placement is just difficult.

review_content.Placements: In our college, a minimum of 40 percent and a maximum of 60 percent of students are placed in different companies. TCS, Tech Mahindra, and different companies hire students in our college, so I prefer students to join our college and continue their studies with a minimum of 3 LPA and a maximum of 10 LPA package.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, there are two buildings. There is a new building and an old building. The new building is for +2 students, and the old building is for graduation and post-graduation students. There are many labs for science students, and in our college, a good Wi-Fi connection is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good for placements and internships.

review_content.Placements: This college guarantees that the education in college will be top-notch. 85 percent of students in the college were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA, and the lowest was 2 LPA. The average package was 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was well developed. We had student centralized atmosphere. For education, there was free Wi-Fi on our campus that was 24X7. A cafeteria was there for students. Labs were well managed and upgraded with a lot of accessories. Classrooms were digitally upgraded.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am sure you will be satisfied with the placements, infrastructure and faculty.

review_content.Placements: As you all know, Physics is a very high cutoff course in B.Sc., and many companies offer much recruitment. Sidhharth, a final year student, got a very good placement offer from many well-known multinational companies. It's not about college, your efforts will pay you in the end.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's almost good, but still there are a few problems, like having average quality of meals, but it has a good environment for studies and looking forward towards your life goals. There is the best accommodation, and I will prefer you for medical facilities and mainly sports, it has much better scope than any other known college to me.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: After the pandemic, the college has gone through several changes.

review_content.Placements: Companies like Wipro and TCS recruit from our college, with a large number of students interested in them. Students prefer to do a part-time job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The E-library has been developing. Wi-Fi is being received at its best, with great connectivity and has more than the above speed per minute. Students are doing practical with great interest and have a connection with faculty. The E-smart classrooms have been started in some departments.
review_content.Faculty: Overall, the faculty is good, but it could be better if the process of approval were done more quickly. They should keep the data online at all times for smoother work and the benefit of students in the short period of time. The connectivity of students with a teacher is best. Students often do the online courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Commercial hub for commerce students

review_content.Placements: About 40–50% of the students get placed. The average package offered is between INR 2,50,000 and 3,00,000 LPA. Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is the top recruiter. Most students get internships under a CA firm. The top roles offered are accounting, bookkeeping, accounting, and auditing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college also arranges visits to factories that provide employment opportunities for graduates. However, the mess and hostel facilities need improvement, as they are not very sanitary or healthy.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers at this college are qualified and have degrees, knowledge, and experience. They provide support and proper guidance to students. The curriculum is strictly as per Utkal University and CHSE syllabus. Semester exams are tricky, and one can only ace them by studying. The pass percentage is mostly 65%.
